info.name: Cloudflare Workers API
info.description:
Cloudflare Workers allows developers to deploy serverless code to Cloudflare's global network. The Workers API provides endpoints for managing worker scripts, versions, deployments, routes, custom domains, secrets, cron triggers, and configuration including bindings.

Contact Support:
 Name: Cloudflare Support
